welcome: 👋 Welcome to NickForge AI! 🤖 I am a professional nickname generator bot. 🎮 Create nicknames for games, 👑 premium, 🔥 cool, and 20+ other styles! 💫 Let's find your unique nickname together!
welcome_force: 📢 Subscribe to channels! To use the bot, you must subscribe to the following channels: ✅ After subscribing, click "Check" button.
sub_success: ✅ Congratulations! You have subscribed to all channels!\n\nNow you can fully use the bot.
sub_fail: ❌ You have not subscribed to all channels yet. Please subscribe:
favorites_empty: ⭐ No favorites yet.\n\nGenerate a nickname and click ⭐ Save!
already_saved: ⚠️ This nickname is already in favorites.
ai_prompt: 🤖 AI Nickname Generator Describe what nickname you want: Example: "I want a hacker nickname" "Something cool"
help_text: ℹ NickForge AI - Help 🤖 What can this bot do? ✅ Generate nicknames in 20+ styles ✅ AI-powered custom nickname generation ✅ Invisible nicknames ✅ Unicode and fancy styles ✅ Save to favorites ✅ Referral system ✅ Daily bonus Commands: /start - Start the bot /generate - Generate nickname /categories - Categories /favorites - Favorites /history - History /profile - Profile /search - Search 💎 Premium features: Coming soon!
admin_dashboard: 📊 Admin Dashboard 👥 Users: {users} 📈 Today: {today} 📊 Yesterday: {yesterday} 📅 This week: {weekly} 📅 This month: {monthly} 💎 Premium: {premium} 📝 Generated today: {gen_today} 📝 Total: {gen_total} 📢 Broadcasts: {broadcasts} 🖥 Server: {'✅ Online' if server_ok else '❌ Offline'} 🗄 Database: {'✅ Online' if db_ok else '❌ Offline'} 🔴 Redis: {'✅ Online' if redis_ok else '❌ Offline'} ⏱ Uptime: {uptime}
daily_claimed: ✅ You already claimed today's bonus! \nNext bonus: {time}
referral_text: 🎯 Referral System Invite friends and earn coins! 🔗 Your link: {link} 👥 Referrals: {count} 💰 Per referral: {coins} coins
maintenance: 🔧 Bot is under maintenance. Please try again later.
error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
